name: M-112
events: 23 Apr 1943 M-112 fires two torpedoes at the German barges F 301 and F 406 south of Feodosia, Crimea in position 44°50'N, 35°12'E. Both torpedoes missed their targets.
25 Jul 1943 M-112 fires two torpedoes at a German barge off Yalta in position 44°31'N, 34°19'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
25 Oct 1943 M-112 torpedoed and sank the barge Tyra 5 (1278 GRT) off Ak Mechet, Crimea in position 45°31'N, 32°36'E.
